captured_from: pre-fix source inspection plus user-reported rendered plan evidence
note: Local browser execution was unavailable in this Codex runtime because the bundled Playwright package is missing playwright-core. This trace records the failing decision path found before behavior changes were applied.

targets.diet_restriction: no meat or poultry; fish, eggs and dairy allowed

exchanges.notes: No exchange kcal values changed by this batch.

candidate_meals.root_cause: These meat/poultry keys were not all represented in the Pescatarian exclusion source and could remain candidates through templates or generated plans.

selected_meals.expected: No meat or poultry meal may be selected for a pescatarian client.

slot_allocations.pre_fix: Diet filtering was applied mainly at dropdown display time and not enforced as a final invariant across template/default/manual/AI paths.
slot_allocations.expected: Every selected breakfast/lunch/dinner key must pass mealAllowedForDiet before rendering or printing.

rendered_portions.pre_fix: Rendered table could include chicken/burger/souvlaki text for a pescatarian template.
rendered_portions.expected: Rendered and printed plans must contain no prohibited food text.

calculated_totals.pre_fix: Calories were still calculated for prohibited meals, so Plan Quality could appear numerically acceptable while clinically invalid.
calculated_totals.expected: Diet compatibility is validated before totals are accepted.

expected: Incompatible meals are replaced with compatible catalog meals when possible.
If catalog coverage is insufficient, unresolved allocation is reported instead of silently violating diet type.
